title: Appropriation accounts 1976 to 1977
body: "This document contains the following information: Appropriation accounts 1976-77: appropriation accounts of the sums granted by Parliament .. for the year ended 31st March 1977 .. Vol. 3.  In continuation of HCP no. 93 of 1976 to 1977.  This paper was laid before Parliament in response to a legislative requirement or as a Return to an Address and was ordered to be printed by the House of Commons. "
